purpose: Track verified original upstream repositories for Skill-hub skills so future upgrades can compare evidence-backed sources instead of guessing by skill name.
rules: Only entries with classification=open-source and updatePolicy=mirror are eligible for automated replacement; mapped entries require review and a declared merge mapping.
Entries marked candidate or unknown require more evidence before overwrite.
Self-made and project-private/local skills are manual unless the owner adds an explicit upstream.
No upstream is considered verified without repository URL, upstream path, ref, commit, and evidence of directory comparison or an explicit source link.

classifications.open-source: Original upstream repository/path/ref/commit verified; updatePolicy controls whether automated updates are allowed.
classifications.candidate: Likely source exists, but immutable source path/commit or content equivalence is not proven.
classifications.unknown: No verified source or self/local provenance established yet.
classifications.self: Evidence indicates a self-authored or owner-maintained skill; external updates disabled.
classifications.local: Repository/project-local or pipeline-local skill; external updates disabled.

verificationSummary.githubCodeSearch: Blocked by GitHub API rate limit during broad exact-name search; unresolved entries keep verificationPath commands for later retry.

sources.name: adaptive-quality-gate
evidence: Skill was created and evaluated in this Skill-hub repository as a domain-independent, risk-adaptive quality gate.
No external upstream package was used as its source.
verificationPath: Use this repository history as the canonical source until an explicit upstream is published.
Validate SKILL.md and evals/evals.json with the repository skill-creator tooling before release.
sources.notes: Self-maintained shared skill; external automatic updates disabled.
